summary: The user is seeking music recommendations similar to The 1975 and expresses interest in attending the Just Like Heaven festival in Los Angeles. They inquire about concert recommendations, pre-parties, after-parties, and meet and greet opportunities with bands, particularly Interpol, at the festival.
facts: The user has been listening to The 1975 nonstop. The user has seen Pale Waves live before. The user is considering attending the Just Like Heaven festival on May 21-22. The user is interested in meet and greet opportunities with Interpol at Just Like Heaven. The user plans to set up alerts for meet and greet tickets going on sale. The user is contemplating purchasing a VIP package for Just Like Heaven to guarantee a meet and greet. The user is located in Los Angeles.
